sourcesContent:
import React from "react";

function Button({ text, onClick }) {
  return <button onClick={onClick}>{text}</button>;
    <svg
      width="66.609px"
      height="47.855px"
      viewBox="0 0 67 48"
      fill="none"
      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
    >
      <path
        d="M10 24H57M57 24L42 9M57 24L42 39"
        stroke="black"
        strokeWidth="4"
        strokeLinecap="round"
        strokeLinejoin="round"
      />
    </svg>
}
export default Button;
